data.title: Bakkt finalizes purchase of stablecoin payments company Distributed Technologies Research, acquiring 9.3 million shares initially.
data.description: In January, Bakkt unveiled a major agreement involving 9.3 million shares and a rebranding to Bakkt Inc.

data.title: Stablecoins surpass Bitcoin in Latin America crypto purchases as dollar-linked stablecoins gain popularity amidst inflation.
data.description: A recent report by Bitso highlights a change in user behavior as dollar-linked stablecoins are increasingly being utilized for daily financial transactions in inflation-plagued economies across Latin America. This trend indicates a growing preference for more stable and reliable forms of digital currency. The report reveals a significant increase in the adoption of these stablecoins, with a notable surge in transactions and usage. This shift underscores the increasing reliance on alternative financial solutions in the region, with a focus on the stability and security that these dollar-linked stablecoins provide amidst economic uncertainties.

data.title: PureHealth Reports Revenue of USD 2.0 Billion and Net Profit of USD 113 Million in Q1-2026
data.description: The company experienced a 10% increase in group revenue compared to the previous year, with significant growth seen in the international portfolio and the Cover vertical. EBITDA also rose by 5% year-on-year, reaching USD 323 million. These positive financial results indicate the company's strong position for future value-enhancing growth opportunities, backed by a stable balance sheet.

data.title: Danish Capital Markets Act mandates disclosure of major shareholders: information regarding large stakeholders shared.
data.description: One hundred forty-four people have been confirmed to have contracted a respiratory illness caused by a novel coronavirus in a certain country. The virus has resulted in four deaths so far. Health officials are closely monitoring the situation and taking necessary precautions to prevent further spread of the virus. The World Health Organization has been notified about the outbreak, and efforts are being made to contain the virus and treat those affected.
Disclosure of 8.5% shareholding by Advanced Medical Solutions Group plc.

data.title: Robo.ai CEO Issues Letter to Investors on 2025 Financial Results: Company Reaching Inflection Point with Positive Cash Flow and Business Order Delivery
data.description: Robo.ai Inc. (NASDAQ: AIIO) recently released its annual financial report for 2025. Under the leadership of CEO Benjamin Zhai, the company has made significant strides since the new management team took charge in May 2025. In the AI software sector, Robo.ai is enhancing its collaboration with DaBoss, an AI model data service provider based in Silicon Valley. Operations are in progress at various sites to gather tens of thousands of hours of real-world interaction data, with the aim of realizing commercial value systematically. Moreover, Robo.ai is actively seeking strategic partnerships with top technology firms in the AI data application field to tackle technical obstacles.

data.title: North Korea-Linked Hackers Make April The Worst Month For Crypto Hacking By Incident Count
data.description: In April, a record number of cryptocurrency hacking incidents occurred, posing challenges for the industry amid a bear market. According to DeFiLlama, a decentralized finance analytics platform, there were nearly 30 incidents in April, the highest in 14 months. Hackers managed to steal $635.24 million during that month, marking the largest monthly total since Bybit's $1.4 billion exchange heist in February 2025. Among the significant hacks were the $290 million exploit of KelpDAO's liquid restaking protocol and Drift Protocol's $285 million exploit, both linked to North Korean state-sponsored hackers. The KelpDAO incident involved targeting a cross-chain bridge powered by LayerZero and stealing restaked Ethereum. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FAST-GROWING KIA AMERICA EXTENDS RECORD ANNUAL SALES PACE THROUGH APRIL
data.description: In the first four months of the year, sales have hit a historic high, reaching 279,718 units, showing a 2 percent increase compared to the previous year. The Telluride, Sportage Hybrid, and Sorento Hybrid recorded their best-ever April sales. Hybrid and electrified models had exceptional results in both monthly and year-to-date sales for April. Additionally, the Telluride, Carnival, Sportage, and K4 models saw positive sales numbers in April.

data.title: ADC Therapeutics Makes Grants to New Employees Under Inducement Plan
data.description: In Lausanne, Switzerland on May 1, 2026, ADC Therapeutics SA (NYSE: ADCT) disclosed the granting of options to buy a total of 49,400 shares of the company. Known as a global front-runner in antibody drug conjugates (ADCs), the company is operating at a commercial level.

data.title: SynbioTech To Unveil Microbiome‑Based Platform for Women's Healthy Aging at Vitafoods Europe 2026
data.description: In Kaohsiung on May 1, 2026, SynbioTech, a company rooted in Taiwan, will showcase a range of microbiome-based products specially designed for women's health. This includes established probiotics for muscle, joint, and kidney health. The company aims to introduce innovative solutions to assist in women's healthy aging.

data.title: ADGM Announces Rokos Capital Management's Abu Dhabi Office Opening Following Authorisation
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, the international financial hub, ADGM disclosed today that Rokos Capital Management (RCM) has established a new branch in the city after obtaining its Financial Services Permission (FSP) from the Financial Services Regulatory authority. This move highlights the growing importance of Abu Dhabi as a financial center, with RCM joining the sector following regulatory approval, emphasizing the city's appeal to global financial entities.
